title: linum usitatissimum subsp. crepitans
intro: Linum usitatissimum subsp. crepitans, commonly known as prickly flax or brittle flax, is a subspecies of the flax plant that belongs to the Linaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Linum usitatissimum subsp. crepitans include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting skin health due to its high content of omega-3 fatty acids and flavonoids. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or topical creams for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
